suppress.notes: AndroidX SQLite artifacts are not SQLite product version 2.6.2. This suppresses the incorrect CPE match reported against androidx.sqlite:sqlite-android and sqlite-framework-android 2.6.2.

The package group prefix com.github.* is not GitHub Enterprise Server. These suppress incorrect GitHub Enterprise Server matches reported against M-Lab ndt7 and Compose Stability runtime Maven artifacts.

Kotlin CVE-2026-53914 affects Kotlin before 2.4.20 via unsafe build-cache metadata deserialization. As of 2026-07-05, Maven Central only has 2.4.20-Beta1 and no stable 2.4.20 Kotlin runtime. Gradle build cache is disabled in gradle.properties as the project mitigation; revisit this suppression when stable Kotlin 2.4.20 or newer is available.
